raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 1,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "No structural reorganization was performed; the text remains in the same order with no section plan or reordering suggestions.",
    "R1.7": "The agent did not add, remove, or reformat citations or references, but it flags one potential issue with the term 'mild' observability condition, suggesting a review of its appropriateness.",
    "RX.1": "The agent softened some claims and removed editorializing adverbs, flagging uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims such as the identifiability of disambiguation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift from the original content.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content were introduced; the agent identified and softened potentially overreaching claims, avoiding downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear rationale in the change log, providing traceability for all edits."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: No structural reorganization was performed; the text remains in the same order with no section plan or reordering suggestions.
rationale.R1.7: The agent did not add, remove, or reformat citations or references, but it flags one potential issue with the term 'mild' observability condition, suggesting a review of its appropriateness.
rationale.RX.1: The agent softened some claims and removed editorializing adverbs, flagging uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims such as the identifiability of disambiguation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift from the original content.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced; the agent identified and softened potentially overreaching claims, avoiding downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear rationale in the change log, providing traceability for all edits.
